Name: FMovieScenePossessable
Description: MovieScenePossessable is a "typed slot" used to allow the MovieScene to control an already-existing object

Variables.Name: Guid
Variables.Description: Unique identifier of the possessable object.

Variables.Name: PossessedObjectClass
Variables.Description: Type of the object we'll be possessing

Variables.Name: ParentGuid
Variables.Description: GUID relating to this possessable's parent, if applicable.
